summary: Iteration 202: Controllo Finale Checklist + Soglia Accettabilita Calibro - All backend tests passed (21/21). Frontend UI verified: ControlloFinaleSection renders with 3 area progress bars, manual check toggles work, save draft works. InstrumentsPage shows Soglia badge on Calibro cards, form shows Soglia section only for type=misura.

issues: Console warning: Encountered two children with the same key (inst_c5ea355990, inst_85dfa1a092) - duplicate instrument IDs in database

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 Controllo Finale endpoints working correctly with proper authentication and error handling
GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} returns 11 checks grouped by 3 areas (Visual Testing, Dimensionale, Compliance) with auto-checks running against real DB data
POST /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} saves manual check results and 3 note fields (note_vt, note_dim, note_generali)
POST /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id}/approva correctly fails with 400 if not all checks pass
GET /api/instruments/ returns soglia_accettabilita and unita_soglia fields for all instruments
PUT /api/instruments/{id} can update soglia_accettabilita with different units (mm, %, N, bar)
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} includes tolleranza_calibro check that uses per-instrument configurable threshold
Frontend ControlloFinaleSection renders with 3 area progress bars showing ok/totale counts
Frontend manual checks can be toggled via checkbox, auto-checks show real-time data with valore and nota
Frontend Save draft button persists manual checks and notes (toast: 'Controllo finale salvato')
Frontend InstrumentsPage shows 'Soglia: ±0.1 mm' badge on Calibro cards (violet background)
Frontend InstrumentsPage form shows 'Soglia di Accettabilita (Racc. RINA n.2)' section only for type=misura
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commessa and instruments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 202 verified Controllo Finale Checklist and Soglia Accettabilita features. Key findings: (1) All 3 Controllo Finale endpoints working correctly. (2) ControlloFinaleSection at data-testid='controllo-finale-section' with 3 area progress bars at data-testid='cf-areas-stats'. (3) Manual check toggles at data-testid='cf-toggle-{check_id}' (e.g., cf-toggle-vt_100_eseguito). (4) Save button at data-testid='cf-save-btn', Approve button at data-testid='cf-approve-start-btn'. (5) Note fields at data-testid='cf-note-vt', 'cf-note-dim', 'cf-note-gen'. (6) InstrumentsPage at /strumenti route with data-testid='instruments-page'. (7) Soglia badge visible on Calibro cards with text 'Soglia: ±0.1 mm'. (8) Form Soglia section only visible when type=misura, hidden for other types. (9) Riesame Tecnico tolleranza_calibro check uses per-instrument configurable threshold. (10) IMPORTANT: API calls must NOT use trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect issues.
